items.title: CAAD: Causality-Aware Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection via Multi-Scale Alignment and Structural Causal Consistency
items.abstract: The operational integrity of complex industrial systems relies on precise anomaly detection and diagnosis. The vast majority of existing methods narrowly focus on capturing temporal similarities of representations, often overlooking the disruption of internal causal relationships, which characterizes system failures and latent anomalies. In this paper, we propose a novel framework (CAAD) that reframes anomaly detection as the continuous verification of Granger causality consistency through exogenous variables.   Specifically, the CAAD framework models exogenous time-series variables as residuals, identifying anomalies as significant deviations caused by external interventions. The proposed framework leverages multi-scale alignment to internalize system dynamics and utilizes a gradient-based matrix to monitor internal causal relationship breakdowns. By quantifying causal deviations of both dynamic evolution and relational topology, the CAAD is able to capture subtle causal shifts to achieve precise anomaly detection. Extensive experiments on real-world industrial datasets demonstrate that the CAAD achieves high-precision anomaly detection, outperforming most state-of-the-art baselines.
items.llm_evidence_en: causality-aware anomaly detection using Granger causality consistency
items.llm_evidence_cn: 利用格兰杰因果一致性进行因果感知异常检测
items.llm_evidence: 利用格兰杰因果一致性进行因果感知异常检测
items.canonical_evidence: 利用格兰杰因果一致性进行因果感知异常检测
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes CAAD, a causality-aware framework for multivariate time series anomaly detection by verifying Granger causality consistency through exogenous variables. Detects anomalies as deviations from causal structure, outperforming similarity-based methods.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出CAAD框架，将异常检测重新定义为通过外生变量持续验证格兰杰因果一致性。现有方法仅关注时序表征相似性，忽视了因果关系的破坏。CAAD将异常识别为因果关系中的显著偏离，通过建模外生变量作为残差，对因果中断敏感。实验表明该方法在工业系统异常检测中优于传统基于相似性的方法。
items.llm_tldr: 该论文提出CAAD框架，将异常检测重新定义为通过外生变量持续验证格兰杰因果一致性。现有方法仅关注时序表征相似性，忽视了因果关系的破坏。CAAD将异常识别为因果关系中的显著偏离，通过建模外生变量作为残差，对因果中断敏感。实验表明该方法在工业系统异常检测中优于传统基于相似性的方法。

items.title: A Design-Based Approach to Testing and Inference in (Quasi-)Experiments with Spillovers
items.abstract: Economic policies rarely affect only their direct targets. To study these spillovers, researchers summarize who else was treated with a simple exposure measure, such as the share of treated neighbors within a radius. But for many settings, economic theory provides little guidance on choosing the functional form (e.g., ring) of that measure or its parameters (e.g., radius). We show that the data can inform both choices. Correctly specified exposure measures imply orthogonality conditions that can be used for both estimation and testing. We establish consistency and asymptotic normality of the resulting estimator under spatial and network dependence in a design-based framework, with all randomness arising from treatment assignment. We then characterize the efficient moment conditions. Applied to two large-scale anti-poverty programs, the framework supports some prior radius estimates but rejects others. In the latter case, the revised radius yields substantively different policy-effect estimates.
items.llm_evidence_en: design-based causal inference for experiments with spillovers
items.llm_evidence_cn: 基于设计的因果推断方法用于含溢出效应的实验
items.llm_evidence: 基于设计的因果推断方法用于含溢出效应的实验
items.canonical_evidence: 基于设计的因果推断方法用于含溢出效应的实验
items.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a design-based framework for testing and inference in experiments with spillovers, using orthogonality conditions from correctly specified exposure measures, with consistency and asymptotic normality under spatial/network dependence.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一个基于设计的因果推断框架，用于处理实验中的溢出效应。通过正确指定的暴露度量隐含的正交条件进行估计和检验，并在空间和网络依赖下建立估计量的一致性和渐近正态性。该方法为政策评估中的因果效应估计提供了新的理论基础。
items.llm_tldr: 本文提出一个基于设计的因果推断框架，用于处理实验中的溢出效应。通过正确指定的暴露度量隐含的正交条件进行估计和检验，并在空间和网络依赖下建立估计量的一致性和渐近正态性。该方法为政策评估中的因果效应估计提供了新的理论基础。
